title: RuleEvaluation
description: A single deterministic rule evaluation result from the ClaimVex rule engine.

rule_id.description: Unique identifier for the deterministic rule (ACC-01 Section 3).

domain.description: Risk domain this rule belongs to.

trigger_matched.description: Whether the rule's trigger condition was met for this input.

message_user.description: User-facing explanation when the rule triggers.

evidence_fields.description: Input fields that contributed to this rule's evaluation.

missing_info_keys.description: Input fields that were missing and needed for this rule.

payer_note.description: Payer-specific guidance note, or null if not applicable.

suppressed_code.description: CPT code suppressed by this rule, or null if none.

payer_context.description: Payer context that influenced this evaluation, or null.

policy_anchor.description: Reference to the policy/guideline backing this rule, or null.
